name: app-attendance
description: Asistencia con QR — monorepo (app móvil Ionic React + API Express + Mongo + SCORM Moodle).

scripts.install:all: npm install && npm --prefix back install && npm --prefix app install
scripts.lint: npm --prefix back run lint && npm --prefix app run lint
scripts.typecheck: npm --prefix back run typecheck && npm --prefix app run typecheck
scripts.test: npm --prefix back test --if-present && npm --prefix app test --if-present
scripts.docker:seed: docker compose exec api node dist/seed.js

author: BrandowC
